message:
feat(python,conformance): consolidate delegation wrappers and expand E2E scenario matrix

Refactor the Python __init__.py delegation layer for better
maintainability, consolidating scattered wrappers and improving
argument forwarding. Expand the E2E scenario matrix with new oracle
contract scenarios and update perf regression baselines.

- python/__init__.py: consolidate and refactor delegation wrappers
  for cleaner argument forwarding and reduced code duplication
- python/backend.py: minor backend adjustment
- scripts/generate_e2e_scenario_matrix.py: expand scenario generation
  with additional graph families and algorithm combinations
- artifacts/e2e: regenerate scenario matrix oracle contract with
  expanded scenarios
- artifacts/perf: update perf regression gate report baselines
- tests: expand test_io_variants, test_isomorphism_parity,
  test_lattice_generators, and test_scale_free_generators with
  additional parity and edge-case coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
